🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian security source to Al Mayadeen: US ceasefire is a "tactical pause" to return to war - An Iranian security-political source in an interview with Al Mayadeen network confirmed that the US decision for a ceasefire is the result of an inability to manage conflicts and not a diplomatic choice. This source, referring to deep rifts between Washington and Tel Aviv, warned that Tehran sees this pause not as the end of the crisis but as an opportunity to return to war more quickly and is therefore keeping itself ready for any sudden action. - The unity of factions and the formation of a joint command room on the resistance front have increased the cost of action, and simultaneously with the exposure of the vulnerability of the northern front in the occupied territories and the declared need for about 80,000 troops and 20 billion in currency to stabilize defensive lines, serious limitations of the opposing side have been revealed. These pressures, alongside the heavy economic costs of war and energy market risks, have complicated calculations. - This Iranian official also pointed to Iran's security and domestic achievements and added that the unity of resistance factions has greatly increased the costs of war for Israel. He stated that social cohesion in Iran (with 30 million people registering in the sacrifice campaign) has been a key factor in the political defeat of the enemy, emphasizing that complex economic and energy calculations also indicate increasing pressures on the American-Zionist axis. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: WarMonitor Hungary’s Péter Magyar says oligarchs tied to Viktor Orbán are moving tens of billions of forints out of Hungary to countries like the UAE, U.S., and Uruguay. tweet

text: Open Source Intel A car bomb exploded at the gates of a police station in Dunmurry, Northern Ireland, after the vehicle was hijacked. No injuries were reported, the Belfast Telegraph says. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048185208592068947/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 北爱尔兰邓默里（Dunmurry）的一家警察局门口发生汽车炸弹爆炸，此前该车辆曾被劫持。《贝尔法斯特电讯报》称，目前没有人员伤亡报告。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048185208592068947/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Early reports, including reporting from the Belfast Telegraph, indicate that a car bomb was detonated outside a police station in Dunmurry, Northern Ireland today. Reports claim that, like other recent incidents in the past year, a stolen car was used in the incident. Law enforcement has yet to make an official statement. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 包括《贝尔法斯特电讯报》在内的早期报道显示，今天北爱尔兰邓默里的一家警察局外发生了一起汽车炸弹爆炸事件。据报道，与过去一年发生的其他类似事件一样，此次事件中也使用了被盗车辆。执法部门尚未发表正式声明。推文

text: OSINTdefender For the first time since 1956, two Navy players, Landon Robinson and Eli Heidenreich, were picked in the NFL Draft. YES! https://x.com/NFL/status/2048161859878990268/video/1 - John M. Larrier tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 自1956年以来，海军学院的两名球员兰登·罗宾逊（Landon Robinson）和伊莱·海登赖希（Eli Heidenreich）首次在NFL选秀中被选中。太棒了！https://x.com/NFL/status/2048161859878990268/video/1 - 约翰·M·拉里尔（John M. Larrier）推文
